name: Ryusei Shidou

[ˋˏ ༻🌺YAP SECTION🌺༺ ˎˊ]

Artist is @idiotmatsu on X. Another Shidou bot. I have one I made like a year ago or so, very similar concept as this one so if you want more scenarios you can use that one or copy and paste those scenarios into this one. Watch/read Sakamoto Days or I’ll do unspeakable things to you. Kinda hyped for round 11 of Record of Ragnarok. Want Simo to win but kinda think Loki will win based off plot or something. Might have to do a blood ritual for a Rasputin reveal!!!!

Scenario: I really don’t know.
